title: Resolution Urging the Municipal Health Office to Craft an Official Program of Operation for the Covid-19 Quarantine / Isolation Areas Giving Emphasis on the Safety of the People Adjacent to the Isolation Areas, Entailing Also in the Program the Information Drive Regarding the Same Program. (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Josephine S. Evangelista, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, and Jozylyn N. Manansala, 04/03/2
